visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a Costco warehouse aisle with two women standing in front of a large display box for a "Tetris Tumble XL Game." The woman on the left wears a black beret and a white sleeveless lace top, holding an orange foam Tetris block. The woman on the right is in a black dress with a cut-out collar, holding a purple block. (2) Close-up shots show the colorful foam Tetris pieces (yellow, blue, orange, purple, green) stacked unevenly on a white plastic base. (3) The left woman holds a large white foam die with colored Tetris icons, explaining the rules of the game to the camera while gesturing with her hands. (4) A quick montage shows the women attempting to stack the foam blocks on the base; their facial expressions are focused and playful as they handle the large, soft objects. (5) The two women give simultaneous thumbs-up gestures to the camera, smiling brightly with a shelf of warehouse goods in the background. (6) A close-up reveals the price tag hanging from a shelf, showing the product code and a price of $2,799. (7) In the final sequence, they continue to play with the blocks, holding them up and laughing while the Costco wholesale logo remains visible at the top of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 2799元! 值得買嗎? 巨大化俄羅斯方塊. (2) [Subtitle]: 你有玩過嗎? 好市多現在有賣. (3) [Subtitle]: 他這俄羅斯方塊要配這個骰子玩. (4) [Subtitle]: 你骰到哪一個你就要用那個積木去疊. (5) [Subtitle]: 很聰明這樣比較刺激. (6) [Variety]: 好難喔. [Subtitle]: 旁邊這邊好難. (7) [Subtitle]: 我們直接被淘汰. (8) [Subtitle]: 我也是滿厲害的. (9) [Subtitle]: 這麼大組呢是 2799元. (10) [Subtitle]: 我覺得很適合跟小朋友一起玩. (11) [Subtitle]: 好可愛喔又很輕不用擔心受傷.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black beret, a white lace top, and a silver crossbody bag; the other woman wears a black top with shoulder cut-outs and has long dark hair.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high-stacking industrial shelves filled with boxed merchandise, bright fluorescent lighting, and large product displays.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic female greeting accompanied by a fast-tempo, upbeat electronic pop track. A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect punctuates the transition. (2) The primary speaker maintains a rapid, high-arousal speech rate, detailing the product features. The BGM has a strong, driving 4/4 beat. (3) Soft thudding sounds of foam blocks being handled are audible beneath the enthusiastic narration. (4) Laughter and excited exclamations from a second female voice are heard as they play. (5) A bright 'ding' or bell SFX sounds when the price is mentioned, adding emphasis to the high-value information. (6) The video concludes with the speaker summarizing her recommendation in a warm, friendly tone as the music continues at a consistent volume before a quick hard cut to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Mechanics -> Experience -> Price -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and review a giant Tetris-themed stacking game found at Costco, highlighting its fun factor and safety for children while questioning its value at the $2,799 price point.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While it features a specific brand (Costco), it appears to be organic user-generated content shared by a lifestyle creator rather than a paid advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy social media style with rapid editing and frequent text overlays to keep viewers engaged with the product review.
